name: Melodies of Love
overview: Ravin, a ballad singer who has a beautiful voice meets and falls in love with Petchlada, the daughter of a senior military officer. But their different social status became an obstacle for their love. How will they overcome this barrier?

trailers.title: เส้นทางความรักที่ถูกสร้างพร้อมกับเสียงเพลง | ลูกกรุง | one สนั่นจอ
